user_message: Give me the manager view on this Blue Yonder Airlines support ticket.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-25 14:29 EST
Subject: Re: Re: whitespace analysis Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for whitespace analysis. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-02-01 13:27 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Blue Yonder Airlines whitespace analysis

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our CIO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 17:29 EST
Subject: whitespace analysis - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with whitespace analysis. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Decision-Maker Reply -> BPF Advance Check template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
